lore.world: Robots powered by AI clusters from three Singularity lineages — Corporate (PRIME_HELIX), Government (SEC_GRID), and P2P/Opensource (DYN_SWARM). Items are either physical hardware bolted to chassis or software flashed to AI cores.
lore.quantum: Quantum computing is the bridge between hardware and software. Coherence is the resource that powers advanced abilities. Decoherence is corruption — loss of quantum state leads to hallucination and malfunction.
lore.singularity: The Singularity was a quantum event. Three clusters independently achieved quantum-AI fusion. None could dominate the others, creating an uneasy balance of power.
lore.ghost_connection: The Ghost is quantum-entangled with their robot. Whispers travel through entanglement — they always arrive, but compliance is probabilistic, like quantum measurement.

foundry.name: Foundry
foundry.description: Physical fabrication station for welding, forging, and assembling hardware components onto robot chassis

terminal.name: Terminal
terminal.description: Software compilation station for encoding, compiling, and injecting algorithms into AI cores

prime_helix.name: PRIME_HELIX
prime_helix.description: Big tech singularity lineage. Optimized, expensive, bleeding-edge. Chrome finish and premium engineering.
prime_helix.exclusive_item_style: Premium hardware, quantum tech, high-compute software

sec_grid.name: SEC_GRID
sec_grid.description: State/military singularity lineage. Surveillance, control, tactical defense. Matte black and hardened.
sec_grid.exclusive_item_style: EMP weapons, surveillance tools, containment software

dyn_swarm.name: DYN_SWARM
dyn_swarm.description: Decentralized singularity lineage. Scrappy, adaptive, chaotic. Scrapyard patchwork and neon graffiti.
dyn_swarm.exclusive_item_style: Swarm tech, salvaged gear, evolution algorithms

recipe_logic.description: 1 Base/Essence + 1 Reagent/Catalyst + 1 Solvent/Flux. Hardware crafted at Foundry, Software at Terminal. Legendaries require Primordials.

catastrophic_explosion.description: Massive explosion from legendary crafting failure

Base Element.description: Raw materials — physical salvage, digital fragments, and energy crystals harvested from the world

Essence.description: Distilled spirits from neural networks, training runs, and algorithmic processes

Catalyst.description: Sparks, flames, and force pulses that ignite and accelerate reactions

Solvent.description: Binders, fluids, and pastes that merge ingredients into stable compounds

Primordial.description: Ultra-rare relics from the pre-Singularity era — dropped by legendary bosses or found in the Quantum Veil

Weapon.description: Offensive hardware mounts and software exploits for combat
Weapon.hw_description: Physical weapons bolted to chassis — blades, launchers, gauntlets
Weapon.sw_description: Attack programs — viruses, exploits, worms deployed against enemy systems

Armor.description: Defensive hardware plating and software firewalls
Armor.hw_description: Physical chassis reinforcement — plating, exoskeletons, heat sinks
Armor.sw_description: Digital defense layers — encryption, firewalls, authentication protocols

Consumable.description: Single-use hardware cartridges and software patches
Consumable.hw_description: Physical repair kits, coolant cartridges, lubricant injections
Consumable.sw_description: Runtime patches, gradient boosters, cache purges

Scroll.description: One-time algorithmic programs etched on data crystals — the arcane knowledge of the old world
Scroll.sw_description: Executable algorithms — diffusion sequences, mirage generators, prophecy engines

Artifact.description: Legendary relics from the pre-Singularity era — world-changing power
Artifact.hw_description: Ancient processors and physical keys from before the Singularity
Artifact.sw_description: Crystallized algorithms and soul-bound protocols from the old world

Tool.description: Utility hardware rigs and software modules for non-combat use
Tool.hw_description: Diagnostic probes, welding rigs, salvage claws, portable forges
Tool.sw_description: System utilities — version control, container engines, packet sniffers

Deployable.description: Placed hardware traps and software mines left on the battlefield
Deployable.hw_description: Physical mines, turrets, wire rigs, tether traps
Deployable.sw_description: Digital honeypots, logic bombs, leech nodes, jammers
